/usr/bin/g++  -mavx2 -include immintrin.h -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/llama-gguf-hash.dir/gguf-hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xxhash.dir/deps/xxhash/xxhash.c.o CMakeFiles/sha1.dir/deps/sha1/sha1.c.o CMakeFiles/sha256.dir/deps/sha256/sha256.c.o  -o ../../../../bin/llama-gguf-hash  -Wl,-rpath,/home/srbank/code/BitNet/build_gcc_avx/3rdparty/llama.cpp/ggml/src: ../../ggml/src/libggml.so -pthread
